---
name: Design proposal
about: Propose or challenge portable specification behavior
title: "[Design] "
labels: design
assignees: ""
---

## Interoperability problem

Who needs to exchange what, and between which independent implementations?

## Examples

Provide at least two realistic examples or counterexamples.

## Proposed boundary

Should this be Core, an optional profile, a namespaced extension, or product behavior?

## Alternatives

Include the no-change option.

## Compatibility

Describe reader, writer, semantic, and migration effects.

## Security and privacy

Describe likely risks and misuse.

## Conformance evidence

How could independent implementations prove agreement?
